name: Cheesy Greek-Topped Taters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart microwave-safe casserole dish, combine spinach, mushrooms, green onions, lemon juice, and butter.
2. Cover loosely with plastic wrap; cook on High for 2 to 3 minutes or until the spinach is limp.
3. Stir in the cheeses.
4. Cut the potatoes in half lengthwise; fluff with a fork.
5. Arrange the potatoes on a microwave-safe platter.
6. Top each potato with the spinach-cheese mixture.
7. Cook on High for 30 to 45 seconds or until heated through.
8. Makes 3 or 6 servings.
